Itemized  ·  Procedures  ·  Inguinal hernia repair, open  ·  California

Inguinal hernia repair, open cost in California.

Cash-pay range for inguinal hernia repair, open across 42 hospitals in California: $232 to $81,453. CPT code 49505. Pulled from each hospital's federally-mandated price transparency file.

$232
Adventist Health Glendale
Glendale, CA

John Muir Health Concord Medical Center
